about_intro_text: Hi! I'm Fravelz. Since I was a kid I've enjoyed and been interested in the world of computing and software development, especially web development.
about_current_text: I'm a frontend developer specialized in web layout, creating fluid, animated, functional, minimalist interfaces. I work with proper semantics and SEO, integrate backend data and services into the frontend, and I also focus on structuring and maintaining frontend code correctly.
about_history_text: At age 9 I received my first computer. At first I used it to watch TV shows on YouTube, but everything changed when I discovered La Geekipedia de Ernesto. I started with courses on Raptor, Java, and Python, and soon built my first graphical interfaces in Java.
about_modal_paragraph1: Over time I began exploring other channels and areas of computing: data science (Pandas, NumPy), artificial intelligence (TensorFlow, Keras), and cybersecurity fundamentals (Bash, Python, and Linux). I also learned and practiced languages such as Python, Java, Go, Ruby, Batch, HTML, and CSS, among others.
about_modal_paragraph2: I created my first GitHub account, although three years later I lost access to it.
about_modal_paragraph3: Later I went deeper into Git and GitHub, writing Python scripts with various libraries. I also worked on desktop development (PyQt5, PySide, Tkinter, and Qt) and web development (HTML, CSS, and JavaScript). I published several of these projects on GitHub (in 2024 I created my second account—my current main account).
about_modal_paragraph4: In September of that year I left school while in 10th grade. Over the following months I focused self-taught on web development, specializing in frontend.
about_modal_paragraph5: Currently I continue learning web development and building projects. My goal is to become one of the best frontend developers by 2031 and work at Google. I also plan to complete high school by taking the ICFES 11 validation, studying independently.
